title: zk-STARKs
description: zk-STARKs are transparent zero-knowledge proofs that avoid trusted setup and lean on hash-based commitments. They matter when comparing proof systems for scalability, auditability, and post-quantum assumptions.

resources.title: STARK paper
resources.notes: Primary-source paper introducing scalable transparent computational integrity.

resources.title: StarkWare STARK paper mirror
resources.notes: Accessible mirror for the canonical STARK paper.
